query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_articles,
  COUNT(DISTINCT title) as unique_titles,
  (COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT title)) as exact_duplicates
FROM articles;

SELECT title, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM articles
GROUP BY title
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;
